data.title: Bitget and Barcelona star Raphinha launch new advertising film
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget and La Liga (LALIGA) launched a new brand cooperation and launched three theme commercials with Barcelona winger Raphinha. The films will be launched in April, focusing on Bitget's core products, Copy Trading, Launchpool and Pre-market, showing the clever integration of sports and trading strategies.
La Liga Executive Director Jorge de la Vega said: "In football matches, victory or defeat often depends on a split second of judgment. The cooperation with Bitget demonstrates the high degree of fit between our two sides in innovative thinking and strategic execution, both on the court and in the trading market."
As the sports world gradually embraces digital innovation, emerging technologies such as Web3 are gradually being integrated into the sports industry. Bitget has previously cooperated with football legend Messi and Italian club Juventus. This cooperation with La Liga will further promote the application and popularization of encryption technology in the sports field, and continue to explore more possibilities for the integration of competitive sports and Web3.

data.title: JASRAC Launches Music IP Management App on Soneium Network
data.description: According to Foresight News, Sony's Layer 2 network, Soneium, has announced the deployment of the KENDRIX music IP management application by the Japanese Society for Rights of Authors, Composers, and Publishers (JASRAC). KENDRIX aims to enhance protection against plagiarism and unauthorized use by offering creator verification and precise timestamp validation. Initially operating on a private blockchain, KENDRIX has now integrated with Soneium to provide a more decentralized and open environment.

data.title: Significant Bitcoin Accumulation Observed as $467 Million Withdrawn from Exchanges
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from IntoTheBlock reveals that over $467 million worth of Bitcoin was withdrawn from exchanges yesterday. This movement indicates a notable accumulation trend in the market.

data.title: KiloEx: Some of the hacker's activity addresses have been monitored, and the hacker can retain 10% of the funds as a white hat bounty
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News KiloEx posted on X: "With the assistance of law enforcement agencies, cybersecurity agencies, and multiple trading platforms and cross-chain bridge protocols, we have investigated and monitored some of the hacker's address activities and are ready to freeze the stolen funds at any time. To resolve this matter, the following plan is proposed: return 90% of the stolen funds to the platform address, the hacker can keep 10% as a white hat bounty, and will issue a statement through social media to acknowledge cooperation and no further action will be taken."

data.title: Binance launches new yield-generating margin asset LDUSDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance announced the launch of a new income-generating margin asset LDUSDT. Users can now exchange their USDT principal-guaranteed and profitable current product assets into LDUSDT and use it as margin for U-based contracts, while still earning real-time annualized rate of return (APR) rewards.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 86,000 USDT with a 1.82% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 15, 2025, 10:01 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 86,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 86,000 USDT, with a narrowed 1.82% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Binance Launches New Reward-Bearing Margin Asset LDUSDT
data.description: Binance has announced the launch of a new reward-bearing margin asset LDUSDT. Now users can use your USDT Simple Earn Flexible assets as margin for USDⓈ-M Futures while still earning real-time APR.

data.title: South Korea Blocks Unregistered Crypto Apps, Targets KuCoin
data.description:
South Korea blocks 14 unregistered crypto apps, impacting KuCoin and MEXC, to prevent money laundering.
source: https://coincu.com/332290-south-korea-blocks-crypto-apps

data.title: Solana rally at risk as bearish shooting star appears on daily chart
data.description:
Solana’s 40% rally from $95. 23 faces a threat from a shooting star candlestick. Technicals show bullish MACD but fragile momentum with $125–$128 support key. Macro pressures and competition challenge SOL’s ability to sustain the $147
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/solana-rally-at-risk-as-bearish-shooting-star-appears-on-daily-chart/

data.title: OKX Web3 wallet is launched at Cryptopedia's 32nd BitcoinOS special event
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, OKX Web3 wallet is now online Cryptopedia's 32nd BitcoinOS special event, which includes three projects: BitcoinOS, BIMA and ZenChain. The event will be held from 18:00 on April 9, 2025 to 18:00 on May 7, 2025 (HKT). During this period, users can complete and verify the interactive tasks of BitcoinOS and its ecological projects through Cryptopedia, and have the opportunity to share BOS tokens with a total value of 750,000 USDT, BOOM tokens with a total value of 20,000 USDT and 10,000 USDC rewards.
It is reported that BitcoinOS transforms the Web3 ecosystem by directly enabling zero-knowledge (zk) proofs on the Bitcoin network, elevating Bitcoin from a value store to a universal settlement and security layer for the crypto ecosystem, which not only retains Bitcoin's unparalleled security model, but also unlocks new potential for smart contracts and computing functions.
